applicability_boundary.admitted_family: Gaussian-OU toy world generated by the existing lab toy-world generator.
applicability_boundary.intervention_boundary: Interventions are finite Gaussian-OU operators: flip latent coordinate signs or replace the sample by its OU pair.
applicability_boundary.model: Script-local numpy logistic probes trained on replayed ground-truth Gaussian-OU latents.
applicability_boundary.representation_boundary: D(z) uses deterministic fallback projection from replayed latent z; this does not claim coverage of torch-only learned representations.
applicability_boundary.threshold_boundary: The high_energy threshold is fixed from each seed's train split before eval and intervention.

negative_result_note: The configured seed count, split, distinctions, threshold rule, and intervention operators are fixed before observing outcomes; weak or failed intervention separation is reported directly.
